emergencyInfo.notes: Ensure ESTA is printed and valid. First hotel allows late check-in. iCloud Budget Sheet: https://www.icloud.com/numbers/049Fp8ziIAp-0vaCNuU40m0-w#Budget_USA

steps.title: Departure & Arrival in New York
steps.description: Flight BF720 from Paris Orly (ORY) Terminal 4 to Newark (EWR) Terminal B. Train transit to Manhattan hotel.

items.title: Flight BF720 (ORY to EWR)
items.details: Terminal 4, Paris Orly. Arrival Newark at 9:00 PM. Sandwich & external batteries required.

items.title: Manhattan Central Hotel Check-in
items.details: Midtown Manhattan. Verify late check-in confirmation.

steps.title: Central Park & Museum of Natural History
steps.description: Matin: Musée d'histoire naturelle. Midi: Central Park cookies & Apple Store. Afternoon: Top of the Rock, Grand Central and Library.

items.title: Museum of Natural History
items.details: Requires New York CityPASS entry reservation.

items.title: Top of the Rock Observation Deck
items.details: Rockefeller Center. Beautiful sunset views over Manhattan.

steps.title: High Line, Chelsea & Times Square
steps.description: Matin: Musée de l'air et de l'espace. Midi: High Line, Little Island, Chelsea Market. Soir: Empire State Building, Broadway, Times Square.

items.title: Intrepid Air & Space Museum
items.details: Pier 86, W 46th St. CityPASS entry.

items.title: Empire State Building
items.details: 86th Floor Observatory. CityPASS entry.

steps.title: Manhattan Districts & Madison Square Garden
steps.description: Matin/Midi: Chinatown, Little Italy, Tribeca, Joe's Pizza. Afternoon: Grand Central, Library, and shopping (Macy's, Aéropostale). Soir: Rooftop.

items.title: Madison Square Garden Tour
items.details: Explore the world's most famous arena.

steps.title: Financial District & Drive to Washington
steps.description: Matin/Midi: Financial District, One World Trade Center, 9/11 Memorial, Brooklyn Bridge. Afternoon: Ferry to New Jersey, Alamo SUV pickup, drive to Washington.

items.title: One World Observatory
items.details: Observe Manhattan from the tallest building in the US.

items.title: Alamo SUV Rental Pick-up
items.details: EWR Airport Alamo Desk. Large SUV booked for the road trip.

items.title: Washington Suburbs Hotel Check-in
items.details: Hotel located outside Washington DC. Late night arrival.

steps.title: Washington DC Monuments Tour
steps.description: Park car outside DC (Capitol Heights or Addison Road Metro). Visite: Capitol, Supreme Court, Washington Monument, White House, WWII, Lincoln & Jefferson Memorials.

items.title: US Capitol Tour
items.details: Guided tour of the crypt, rotunda, and National Statuary Hall.

steps.title: Flight Washington to Orlando
steps.description: Morning: Fly from Washington to Orlando. Afternoon: Rent car in Orlando and check-in to Orlando hotel. City exploration.

items.title: Flight to Orlando
items.details: Verify luggage weights. 3 cabin bags, 1 check-in bag.

items.title: Orlando Resort Check-in
items.details: 6 nights stay in Orlando. Pool access.

steps.title: Universal Epic Universe
steps.description: Full day at the brand-new Universal Epic Universe theme park. Mind-blowing new worlds.

items.title: Epic Universe Theme Park
items.details: Single-day dated ticket. Gates open at 9 AM.

steps.title: Busch Gardens Tampa & Mötley Crüe Concert
steps.description: Day: Thrill rides and animals at Busch Gardens Tampa. Evening: Mötley Crüe concert in Tampa.

items.title: Busch Gardens Tampa
items.details: Includes 1-day entry + free extra day.

items.title: Mötley Crüe Live Concert
items.details: Tampa Arena venue. Heavy metal night.

steps.title: Disney Hollywood Studios
steps.description: Full day exploring Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge and Tower of Terror at Disney's Hollywood Studios.

items.title: Disney Hollywood Studios
items.details: Park reservation confirmed. Star Wars rise of resistance early queue recommended.

steps.title: Kennedy Space Center & Bioluminescence
steps.description: Day: Rockets and shuttles at KSC. Rocket launch watch. Night: Bioluminescence Kayaking at Space Coast.

items.title: Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex
items.details: Explore Saturn V rocket and Space Shuttle Atlantis.

items.title: Bioluminescence Kayaking Tour
items.details: Paddle in glowing waters on the Space Coast. Mosquito spray mandatory.

steps.title: Space Coast & Cap Canaveral Beach
steps.description: Free exploration day in Cap Canaveral. Chill at Playalinda Beach, watch potential rocket launch.

steps.title: Drive to Miami & Everglades Airboat
steps.description: Morning: Drive to Miami. Afternoon: Airboating tour ($80) in the Everglades, Anhinga Trail walking to spot alligators. Soir: Check-in to Miami Hotel.

items.title: Everglades Airboat Tour & Wildlife Show
items.details: Ride across marshlands, spot wild alligators.

items.title: Miami Beach Hotel Check-in
items.details: 9 nights stay in Miami. Close to South Beach.

steps.title: Miami Beach & Key Largo Snorkeling
steps.description: Key Largo day trip. Coral reef snorkeling with equipment provided, then beach relaxation.

items.title: Coral Reef Snorkeling Tour
items.details: John Pennekamp Coral Reef State Park.

steps.title: Overseas Highway & Key West Sunset Snorkel
steps.description: Drive the Overseas Highway to Key West. Afternoon: Catamaran snorkeling on the reefs with drinks and sunset.

items.title: Key West Catamaran Reef Snorkel & Sunset
items.details: GetYourGuide booking. Drinks included post snorkel. Duration: ~3h.

steps.title: Key West Mangrove Kayak
steps.description: Morning: 2-hour kayak tour in Key West mangroves. Look out for lamantins, nurse sharks, and jellyfish.

items.title: Key West Mangrove Kayak Excursion
items.details: Single or tandem kayak options. Guided tour.

steps.title: Miami City & Little Havana
steps.description: Wynwood Walls in the morning, Cuban coffee and music in Little Havana in the afternoon.

steps.title: Beach Chill & Decathlon Snorkel
steps.description: Relaxation and swimming on South Beach. Bring Decathlon snorkel glasses.

steps.title: Everglades Shark Valley Bike Ride
steps.description: Rent bikes at Shark Valley and ride the 24km scenic loop. Outstanding wildlife views.

items.title: Shark Valley Bike Rental
items.details: Rent bikes on-site (~$9/hour). Helmet recommended.

steps.title: Coral Gables & Key Biscayne Light
steps.description: Matin: Venetian Pool in Coral Gables. Afternoon: Visit Cape Florida Lighthouse in Key Biscayne.

steps.title: Florida Outlets Shopping Day
steps.description: All day shopping at Dolphin Mall or Sawgrass Mills outlets.

steps.title: Miami Beach Departure
steps.description: Final packing. Airport transfer. Flight BF743 from Miami (MIA) at 11:05 PM to Paris Orly (ORY).

items.title: Flight BF743 (MIA to ORY)
items.details: Overnight flight to Paris Orly Terminal 4.

steps.title: Arrival in Paris
steps.description: Landing at Paris Orly Terminal 4 at 2:00 PM local time.
